We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 2.09s, d = 25.01m:
t^2 = 2.09 * 2.09:
2.09 * 0.09 = 0.1881
2.09 * 2.00 = 4.1800
0.1881 + 4.1800 = 4.3681
k = 25.01 / 2.09^2 = 25.01 / 4.3681 = 25.010 / 4.368
= 0 + 1 * 25010 / 4368
= 1 + 1 * 20642 / 4368
= 2 + 1 * 16274 / 4368
= 3 + 1 * 11906 / 4368
= 4 + 1 * 7538 / 4368
= 5 + 1 * 3170 / 4368
= 5.0 + 0.1 * 31700 / 4368
= 5.1 + 0.1 * 27332 / 4368
= 5.2 + 0.1 * 22964 / 4368
= 5.3 + 0.1 * 18596 / 4368
= 5.4 + 0.1 * 14228 / 4368
= 5.5 + 0.1 * 9860 / 4368
= 5.6 + 0.1 * 5492 / 4368
= 5.7 + 0.1 * 1124 / 4368
= 5.70 + 0.01 * 11240 / 4368
= 5.71 + 0.01 * 6872 / 4368
= 5.72 + 0.01 * 2504 / 4368
= 5.720 + 0.001 * 25040 / 4368
= 5.721 + 0.001 * 20672 / 4368
= 5.722 + 0.001 * 16304 / 4368
= 5.723 + 0.001 * 11936 / 4368
= 5.724 + 0.001 * 7568 / 4368
= 5.725 + 0.001 * 3200 / 4368
= 5.725

t = 2.11s, d = 25.49m:
t^2 = 2.11 * 2.11:
2.11 * 0.01 = 0.0211
2.11 * 0.10 = 0.2110
2.11 * 2.00 = 4.2200
0.0211 + 0.2110 = 0.2321
0.2321 + 4.2200 = 4.4521
k = 25.49 / 2.11^2 = 25.49 / 4.4521 = 25.490 / 4.452
= 0 + 1 * 25490 / 4452
= 1 + 1 * 21038 / 4452
= 2 + 1 * 16586 / 4452
= 3 + 1 * 12134 / 4452
= 4 + 1 * 7682 / 4452
= 5 + 1 * 3230 / 4452
= 5.0 + 0.1 * 32300 / 4452
= 5.1 + 0.1 * 27848 / 4452
= 5.2 + 0.1 * 23396 / 4452
= 5.3 + 0.1 * 18944 / 4452
= 5.4 + 0.1 * 14492 / 4452
= 5.5 + 0.1 * 10040 / 4452
= 5.6 + 0.1 * 5588 / 4452
= 5.7 + 0.1 * 1136 / 4452
= 5.70 + 0.01 * 11360 / 4452
= 5.71 + 0.01 * 6908 / 4452
= 5.72 + 0.01 * 2456 / 4452
= 5.720 + 0.001 * 24560 / 4452
= 5.721 + 0.001 * 20108 / 4452
= 5.722 + 0.001 * 15656 / 4452
= 5.723 + 0.001 * 11204 / 4452
= 5.724 + 0.001 * 6752 / 4452
= 5.725 + 0.001 * 2300 / 4452
= 5.725

t = 2.52s, d = 36.36m:
t^2 = 2.52 * 2.52:
2.52 * 0.02 = 0.0504
2.52 * 0.50 = 1.2600
2.52 * 2.00 = 5.0400
0.0504 + 1.2600 = 1.3104
1.3104 + 5.0400 = 6.3504
k = 36.36 / 2.52^2 = 36.36 / 6.3504 = 36.360 / 6.350
= 0 + 1 * 36360 / 6350
= 1 + 1 * 30010 / 6350
= 2 + 1 * 23660 / 6350
= 3 + 1 * 17310 / 6350
= 4 + 1 * 10960 / 6350
= 5 + 1 * 4610 / 6350
= 5.0 + 0.1 * 46100 / 6350
= 5.1 + 0.1 * 39750 / 6350
= 5.2 + 0.1 * 33400 / 6350
= 5.3 + 0.1 * 27050 / 6350
= 5.4 + 0.1 * 20700 / 6350
= 5.5 + 0.1 * 14350 / 6350
= 5.6 + 0.1 * 8000 / 6350
= 5.7 + 0.1 * 1650 / 6350
= 5.70 + 0.01 * 16500 / 6350
= 5.71 + 0.01 * 10150 / 6350
= 5.72 + 0.01 * 3800 / 6350
= 5.720 + 0.001 * 38000 / 6350
= 5.721 + 0.001 * 31650 / 6350
= 5.722 + 0.001 * 25300 / 6350
= 5.723 + 0.001 * 18950 / 6350
= 5.724 + 0.001 * 12600 / 6350
= 5.725 + 0.001 * 6250 / 6350
= 5.725

t = 1.05s, d = 6.31m:
t^2 = 1.05 * 1.05:
1.05 * 0.05 = 0.0525
1.05 * 1.00 = 1.0500
0.0525 + 1.0500 = 1.1025
k = 6.31 / 1.05^2 = 6.31 / 1.1025 = 6.310 / 1.102
= 0 + 1 * 6310 / 1102
= 1 + 1 * 5208 / 1102
= 2 + 1 * 4106 / 1102
= 3 + 1 * 3004 / 1102
= 4 + 1 * 1902 / 1102
= 5 + 1 * 800 / 1102
= 5.0 + 0.1 * 8000 / 1102
= 5.1 + 0.1 * 6898 / 1102
= 5.2 + 0.1 * 5796 / 1102
= 5.3 + 0.1 * 4694 / 1102
= 5.4 + 0.1 * 3592 / 1102
= 5.5 + 0.1 * 2490 / 1102
= 5.6 + 0.1 * 1388 / 1102
= 5.7 + 0.1 * 286 / 1102
= 5.70 + 0.01 * 2860 / 1102
= 5.71 + 0.01 * 1758 / 1102
= 5.72 + 0.01 * 656 / 1102
= 5.720 + 0.001 * 6560 / 1102
= 5.721 + 0.001 * 5458 / 1102
= 5.722 + 0.001 * 4356 / 1102
= 5.723 + 0.001 * 3254 / 1102
= 5.724 + 0.001 * 2152 / 1102
= 5.725 + 0.001 * 1050 / 1102
= 5.725

k values: 5.725, 5.725, 5.725, 5.725
k values (sorted): 5.725, 5.725, 5.725, 5.725
The median k is 5.725.

For t = 1.85:
t^2 = 1.85 * 1.85:
1.85 * 0.05 = 0.0925
1.85 * 0.80 = 1.4800
1.85 * 1.00 = 1.8500
0.0925 + 1.4800 = 1.5725
1.5725 + 1.8500 = 3.4225
= 3.4225

d = 5.725 * 3.4225:
5.725 * 0.0005 = 0.0028625
5.725 * 0.0020 = 0.0114500
5.725 * 0.0200 = 0.1145000
5.725 * 0.4000 = 2.2900000
5.725 * 3.0000 = 17.1750000
0.0028625 + 0.0114500 = 0.0143125
0.0143125 + 0.1145000 = 0.1288125
0.1288125 + 2.2900000 = 2.4188125
2.4188125 + 17.1750000 = 19.5938125
= 19.593

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{19.593}
